channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Angel Reese mocked for missing layup repeatedly after comments about WNBA players sitting out for more money
item.description: On Monday, WNBA star Angel Reese missed three straight layups in an Unrivaled game after she had made comments about players possibly sitting out for more money.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Floyd Burnsed shares more details about sudden Acalanes resignation
item.description: Burnsed says disagreement with principal Eric Shawn over the role of now-coach Joel Isaac was impetus for resignation
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Vikings focus up front in free agency by reaching deals with DT Jonathan Allen, G Will Fries
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings continued an aggressive reconstruction of the interior lines on Tuesday by agreeing to terms on contracts with former Washington defensive tackle Jonathan Allen and former Indianapolis guard Will Fries, who followed center Ryan Kelly from the Colts to the Vik
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Teams vying for No. 1 NCAA seeds stated their cases and now its up to selection committee to decide
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Southern California have all stated their cases for No. 1 seeds in the NCAA Tournament with their stellar play this season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: After the milestone was first wiped out by an offsides review, MacKinnon finally earns 1,000th point
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nathan MacKinnon appeared to have reached the 1,000-point milestone in the first period of Colorado's game against Chicago. His teammates even streamed onto the ice to celebrate his history-making assist. That turned out to be just a dress rehearsal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz losing skid hits six after 114-108 loss at Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) - Sam Hauser made nine 3-pointers — seven in the third quarter — and finished with a career-high 33 points to lead the short-handed Boston Celtics past the Utah Jazz 114-108 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New York Yankees ace Gerrit Cole to have season-ending Tommy John surgery
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Yankees ace Gerrit Cole will have season-ending Tommy John surgery on his right elbow on Tuesday. The Yankees said the 34-year-old right-hander was examined Monday by Dr. Neal ElAttrache at the Cedars-Sinai Kerlan-Jobe Institute in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears sign center Drew Dalman to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed top free agent center Drew Dalman, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter. The 26-year-old former Falcon completes an overhaul of the Bears' interior offensive line after Poles and company jumped the market by trading for guards Joe Thuney and Jonah Jackson.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Soldier Field to host Premier League doubleheader this summer
item.description: The Premier League Summer Series is coming to Chicago this summer, featuring four Premier League clubs - AFC Bournemouth, Everton, Manchester United, and West Ham United - in a doubleheader at Soldier Field on Wednesday, July 30.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Mater Dei Catholic 59, Carlsbad 52
item.description: Mater Dei Catholic winning and advancing to the Division III State Regional semifinals, 59-52 over Carlsbad,
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Cathedral Catholic 3, Granite Hills 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Volleyball action on Wednesday night Cathedral Catholic beat Granite Hills in three sets.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Volleyball: The Bishop's School 3, La Jolla 1
item.description: Boys Volleyball matchup is the battle of Pearl street between The Bishop's school Knights and La Jolla Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
